$comment: Letter content contract. One page, never more. First paragraph states purpose in one sentence; last paragraph states the specific ask or next step; everything between is evidence, one point per paragraph.

paragraphs.$comment: 3-5 paragraphs. Tone follows the use case: resignation (grateful + clear), recommendation (specific + enthusiastic), proposal (value-first + concrete).

signoff.$comment: Matches formality: Sincerely (formal), Best regards (professional-warm), CN options like 此致 敬礼 / 顺颂商祺.
